name: pr_tms_handoff_ctl
drl:
rule A when Ord(amount > 100) then insertLogical(new Flag("v")); end
rule B when Ord(vip == true) then insertLogical(new Flag("v")); end
rule OBS when Flag($k : k) then insert(new Seen($k)); end
_finding: The handoff control (round 16 C1): BOTH justifiers active first, then one update breaks only A. The key keeps a live justifier throughout, the Flag survives in place, no flicker - the observer fires ONCE for the whole run (one Seen). The pair with pr_tms_handoff_upd pins the boundary: form-and-break-in-one-step flickers, break-one-of-two does not.
